rebuildAndOriginalMapping.summary: TMM ARM4 readiness-gate continuity was hardened, the original-system crosswalk and source-only internal tooling vocabulary map were added, the internal viewer/editor command-boundary proof plan/checker keeps -modelviewer and -cutsceneeditor source-only and blocked from product launch surfaces, the AYA resource tag-family static contract/checker keeps LVLR, WRES, ERES, LNDS, PAGE, GDIE, MESH, and TEXT as loader-contract vocabulary pending later higher-authority proof, and the render-resource bridge static contract/checker routes MESH/TEXT only into existing renderer/material/mesh/texture static docs.

The AYA tag-family static-contract checker is a source/static planning guard; it is not corpus proof, runtime parser proof, extractor execution, importer execution, generated asset output, renderer proof, AppCore/WinUI/CLI/release support, or rebuild parity evidence.

The render-resource bridge static-contract checker is a source/static planning guard; it is not runtime parser proof, runtime texture decode proof, GPU upload proof, texture pixel proof, runtime mesh-loading proof, animation/skinning proof, collision proof, material appearance proof, shader behavior proof, visual output proof, renderer behavior proof, extractor/importer execution, generated asset output, AppCore/WinUI/CLI/Godot/release support, product exposure, or rebuild parity evidence.

No command arming, importer execution, private asset read, generated payload output, runtime proof, rebuild parity, visual/gameplay parity, or no-noticeable-difference proof.
